notes:
>tested_media-foundation-workaround_with_lutris<
winesteam 
sudo apt-get install git
cd $HOME
git clone https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install
cd mf-install
WINEPREFIX=$HOME/.local/share/lutris/runners/winesteam/prefix64/ ./install-mf.sh
game runs! I posted a steam communityvideo at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DX7oMPpAgDs
title: Trover Saves the Universe

notes: Had to install https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install This didn't work on a previous version but it works now. It's a little slow when you first look through the door of the ship, but it runs well after that.
title: Trover Saves the Universe
